task_description: Search for semiconductor supply chain information and, combined with supplier notifications in email, assess supply chain risks.
prompt: Please search for the latest developments in the global semiconductor supply chain in 2026, and also review supplier notifications received via email. Generate a supply chain risk assessment report covering: 1) Global chip supply and demand situation; 2) Key supplier risk ratings; 3) Impact of geopolitics on the supply chain; 4) Risk mitigation measures and alternative solution recommendations.
